CustomField.formula: CASE( MOD( DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) - DATE( 1900, 1, 7 ), 7 ), 0, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) - 2, 1, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) - 3, 2, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) - 4, 3, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) - 5, 4, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) - 6, 5, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate), DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) - 1 )
CustomField.label: Start of Week
